headline: S&P Global (SPGI) Reshapes Leadership And Operations, Is The Stock Fully Valued?
summary: S&P Global (SPGI) has announced a series of leadership and structural changes, including the planned retirement of long serving Chief Legal Officer Steven Kemps and a new operating model for its Market Intelligence segment. See our latest analysis for S&P Global. S&P Global’s recent leadership changes and the updated Market Intelligence structure come as the stock shows short term momentum, with a 7 day share price return of 9.46% and a 3 year total shareholder return of 21.59% that contrasts...

headline: S&P Global (SPGI) Completes Mobility Spin Off And Reworks Market Intelligence
summary: S&P Global (NYSE:SPGI) has completed the spin-off of its Mobility business, separating it from the rest of the company. The company has released recast historical financials to reflect the new structure and plans to provide updated guidance based on its ongoing operations. S&P Global is reorganizing its Market Intelligence segment into two new verticals focused on AI-driven and enterprise solutions, alongside several leadership changes including the retirement of its Chief Legal...
